highlights.text: I wrote in my Wednesday newsletter last week: “The short term bull case is that this current consolidation represents a mature bull flag 5790 with 5770-72 key mid-pivot.
This afternoon, ES returned to the level, flushed it, put in another monster failed breakdown to rally into the close back to 5820 range resistance.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over multiple quality (and not so quality) examples of my core setup (the failed breakdown) we have had over the last few days.

post_title: Bulls Win September In SPX. Can Momentum Continue Into October? Oct 1st Plan
